\tzpentry{ID3764}{Text Magnetic Flux Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3764 introduces Text Magnetic Flux Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\\n\\\\epsilon_{\\\\text{TZP}} = \\\\frac{1}{\\\\Phi^2}, \\\\quad \\\\text{where} \\\\quad \\\\Phi := \\\\frac{1 + \\\\sqrt{5}}{2}\\n\\\\]
